next_lanes.assembly: Use minimal FFmpeg only after accepted clips exist; hand broader production to create-movie.
next_lanes.continuity: Run VLM/LLM checks through scillm against character_scene_bible.json.
next_lanes.i2v: Use Dockerized ComfyUI TurboDiffusion TurboWan2.2-I2V-A14B-720P for accepted keyframes.
next_lanes.keyframes: Use local/containerized keyframe workflow first; Chutes z-image-turbo only after canary proof.
next_lanes.self_improvement_loop: Generated keyframes/clips must be checked, corrected, regenerated or explicitly fall back before advancing.
next_lanes.stage_reports: Each stage must write text/visual outputs and failure gaps to pipeline_stage_report.json and pipeline_stage_report.md.
